chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-819 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For Order as to maintainability of Petition. 29.01.2026. Mr. Haider Raza, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Awais Malano, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. K.A Vaswani, Asstt. Advocate General. --------------- By consent, Order of Provincial Ombudsman dated 16.01.2015 and Order of Governor dated 18.12.2015, which are the subject matter of this Petition are set-aside inasmuch as it is stated that the rights and claims of the Petitioner and Respondent No.5 in relation to the property in question are also the subject matter of Suit No.5935/2025 pending before the VIth Senior Civil Judge, Malir, and would be decided therein. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly, leaving the parties to pursue their rights and claims in the aforementioned Suit. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
